ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Whether to show the instructions on how to use the plugin when using it
ast.target: 使用插件时是否显示使用说明

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, the plugin won't allow you to title notes with Window's illegal characters even if you are not on Windows. If running on windows this setting has no effect.
ast.target: 开启后，即使不在 Windows 上，插件也不允许你使用 Windows 的非法字符作为笔记标题。如果在 Windows 上运行，此设置无效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default file extension of the notes
ast.target: 笔记的默认文件扩展名

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When creating a new note, and you have not written anything into the text box, the first folder recommendation will be your current folder.
ast.target: 创建新笔记且文本框为空时，第一个推荐文件夹将是当前文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, a Recommendation named "Current Folder" will be available on the folder selection, you can change the name of the recommendation on the next setting.
ast.target: 开启后，文件夹选择中会提供名为“Current Folder”的推荐，你可以在下一个设置中更改该推荐名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the "Current Folder" recomendation on the folder selection.
ast.target: 文件夹选择中“Current Folder”推荐的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When you create a note without giving it a title, the program will use the default title specified in the 'Name for untitled notes' setting. However, if this setting is turned off, the program will ask you to enter a title for the note.
ast.target: 当你创建笔记但未设置标题时，程序将使用“未命名笔记的名称”设置中指定的默认标题。但是，如果关闭此设置，程序会提示你为笔记输入标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default name for untitled notes
ast.target: 未命名笔记的默认名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When this option is turned on, the 'New Note' button located on top of the file explorer will function as a shortcut to the command that is defined on the 'Override command'.
ast.target: 开启后，文件资源管理器顶部的“New Note”按钮将作为“Override command”中定义命令的快捷方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The command that will be called when you click Obsidian's 'New note' button.
ast.target: 点击 Obsidian 的“New note”按钮时将调用的命令。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show instructions
ast.target: 显示说明

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Windows note title compatibility
ast.target: Windows 笔记标题兼容性

ast.name: setName
ast.source: File extension
ast.target: 文件扩展名

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Current folder first
ast.target: 优先当前文件夹

ast.source: Current folder recommendation
ast.target: 当前文件夹推荐

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Current folder recommendation name
ast.target: 当前文件夹推荐名称

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Allow untitled notes
ast.target: 允许无标题笔记

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 无标题笔记名称

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 日期格式

ast.source: Override Obsidian's new note button

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Override command
ast.target: 覆盖命令

ast.source: Title of the note...

ast.target: 文件夹路径...

ast.target: 当前文件夹

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Add a title to the note
ast.target: 为笔记添加标题

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note title must not include any of this characters: < > : " ? | *
ast.target: 笔记标题不能包含以下任一字符：< > : " ? | *

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note title must not be only '\\' or '/'
ast.target: 笔记标题不能仅为“\\”或“/”

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note extension must not include any of this characters: < > : "  ? | * /
ast.target: 笔记扩展名不能包含以下任一字符：< > : "  ? | * /

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The note extension must not include the character: /
ast.target: 笔记扩展名不能包含字符：/

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: That note already exists
ast.target: 该笔记已存在

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error opening the file, report issue to GitHub
ast.target: 打开文件出错，请到 GitHub 报告问题
